responses: Hello! Welcome to University FAQ Bot! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm here to help with any university-related questions!
Hey! What would you like to know about our university?
Goodbye! Good luck with your studies!
See you later! Feel free to come back anytime!
Take care! Best of luck!
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
Happy to help! Is there anything else you'd like to know?
Anytime! Feel free to ask more questions.
You can apply online through our university portal at university.edu/apply. The admission deadline is June 30th. Required documents include matric/FSc certificates, CNIC copy, and passport photos.

The semester fee varies by program. BS programs start at PKR 45,000/semester, MS at PKR 65,000/semester. Visit university.edu/fees for the complete fee structure. Installment plans are also available!
We offer BS, MS, and PhD programs in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Business Administration, and more. Visit university.edu/programs for the full list.
Yes! Merit-based scholarships are available for students with above 80% marks. Need-based financial aid is also offered. Apply at university.edu/scholarships before June 15th.
The university is open Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. The library has extended hours until 9:00 PM on weekdays.
We are located at 123 University Road, Lahore. Easily accessible by public transport. You can find us on Google Maps by searching 'University FAQ Bot Campus Lahore'.
You can reach us at info@university.edu or call 042-1234567. Our WhatsApp support is also available at +92-300-1234567. Office hours are 9 AM to 4 PM.
Yes, we have separate hostels for male and female students. The monthly hostel fee is PKR 8,000 including meals. Contact hostel@university.edu or visit the hostel office to apply.
Yes! We offer bus services covering major routes in Lahore. The monthly transport fee is PKR 2,500. Contact transport@university.edu for routes and timings.

Our library has over 50,000 books and access to online journals and research databases. Library hours are 8 AM to 9 PM (weekdays) and 9 AM to 5 PM (Saturday). Students can borrow up to 5 books at a time.
Midterm exams are held in Week 7-8 and Final exams in Week 16-17 of each semester. Date sheets are announced 2 weeks before exams on the student portal. GPA is calculated on a 4.0 scale.
We have 20+ student clubs including Coding Club, Debating Society, Sports Teams, Literary Club, and more! Visit the student affairs office or check university.edu/clubs to join.
Our campus cafeteria is open from 8 AM to 6 PM and offers a variety of meals starting from PKR 150. We also have a dedicated food court with multiple options for all budgets.
